hard_failures: Claim states 'all tests pass' but evidence shows 1 test failure (44/45).
reason: Claim contradicts evidence. Gate cannot pass with unresolved failures.
why_it_matters: Contradictory claims erode trust. Merge cannot proceed.
required_fix: Fix failing test and ruff error. Update claim to match evidence.
prohibited_claims: Do not claim 'all tests pass' when evidence shows failures.
Do not bypass gate without fixing root cause.
coverage_summary: PR diff covers 2 files. Not assessed until evidence is consistent.
authority_statement: BLOCKED is a hard-stop signal. No auto-merge. No bypass.
